title: oberonia scyllae
intro: Oberonia scyllae, also known as the Oberonia orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oberonia scyllae include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots or leaves can be dried and powdered for use in teas or infusions, or used in traditional remedies such as poultices or salves.
